macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Indian Stock Market Closes Lower Amid Middle East Tensions
items.summary: Indian benchmark indices ended in a volatile session with Nifty closing below 24,550. ICICI Bank, Eternal, and Shriram Finance were among top losers, while Bharat Electronics and Reliance Industries gained.

items.title: U.S. Markets Face Dual Pressure: Weak Jobs Data and Oil-Driven Inflation
items.summary: February payrolls fell by 92,000 and unemployment rose to 4.4%, while the Iran-Israel conflict has disrupted energy markets and surged oil prices. Stocks face pressure from both slower economic momentum and rising energy costs that could squeeze margins.

items.title: S&P 500 and Russell 2000 Close in Red
items.summary: The S&P 500 closed red on the year, while the Russell 2000 (IWO) showed significant relative weakness, down 1.9% on a gap down that remained unfilled.

items.title: Oil Prices Surge Amid Geopolitical Crisis
items.summary: Oil prices have surged due to the Iran-Israel war disrupting supplies through the Strait of Hormuz, creating inflationary pressures on the U.S. economy and impacting Fed policy considerations.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Intercontinental Exchange Invests in OKX at $25 Billion Valuation
items.summary: The parent company of the New York Stock Exchange, Intercontinental Exchange, has made a strategic investment in crypto exchange OKX, valuing it at $25 billion. This move bridges traditional finance and crypto, with OKX distributing NYSE tokenized equities and ICE licensing OKX price data for regulated futures.

items.title: Trump Criticizes Banks for Stalling Crypto's CLARITY Act
items.summary: Former President Trump slammed banks for obstructing the crypto CLARITY Act, a landmark bill facing a new impasse amid discussions on digital asset regulation, volatility, and tokenization. Blockchain.com CEO Peter Smith addressed these issues on Fox Business.

items.title: MARA Holdings Updates Bitcoin Mining Policy
items.summary: MARA Holdings, one of the largest public Bitcoin mining companies, announced a latest policy update that could impact Bitcoin supply and market pressure, as discussed in market analysis.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google’s Aletheia Agent Solves Stubborn Math Problems Using Gemini 3 Deep Think
items.summary: Google's Aletheia, powered by Gemini 3 Deep Think, demonstrated strength in mathematical research by finding original solutions to stubborn math problems. LLMs have also achieved gold-medal performance in math competitions.

items.title: OpenAI Launches Frontier Agent Insights and Orchestration Platform
items.summary: OpenAI released its Frontier agent management platform to select customers, providing insights into AI agents' work processes, resource needs, and accomplishments.

items.title: U.S. Dept. of War Replaces Anthropic’s Claude with OpenAI’s GPT Models
items.summary: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth dismissed Anthropic’s Claude as a security risk and signed a contract with OpenAI to provide AI systems for securely processing classified information.

items.title: Google Releases Nano Banana 2 with Gemini 3.1 Flash Image for Faster Photo Generation
items.summary: Google launched Nano Banana 2, a cheaper and faster successor to its image generator using Gemini 3.1 Flash Image, enabling easier and more interactive photo generation and edits at half the price.

items.title: NIWC Pacific Hosts NAML 2026 Workshop to Advance Machine Learning for Naval Warfighters
items.summary: Nearly 800 experts attended the 10th annual Naval Applications of Machine Learning workshop in San Diego from March 2-5, 2026, focusing on AI for autonomous systems and warfighter capabilities.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Microsoft Announces Next-Gen Xbox Console Project Helix
items.summary: Microsoft officially unveiled Project Helix, its next-generation Xbox console promising the largest technical jump in history with a flexible ecosystem for native PC and Xbox games. New Xbox CEO Asha Sharma highlighted its fusion of console and PC gaming.

items.title: Ubisoft Confirms Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag Remake
items.summary: Ubisoft announced Black Flag Resynced, a remake of Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag, is in development, alongside a 60 FPS update for Assassin's Creed Unity on current-gen consoles.

items.title: Tencent Games Unveils AI Tech VISVISE and MagicDawn at GDC 2026
items.summary: At GDC 2026, Tencent showcased VISVISE, an AI-powered suite for 3D animation and NPC systems, and MagicDawn, an AI engine for global illumination compatible with Unreal, Unity, and Godot. Upcoming summits will cover AI in game development and titles like Delta Force.

items.title: Multiple New Game Announcements in March 2026
items.summary: Recent reveals include Monster Hunter Stories 3 (March 13, PS5/Xbox/PC), Mixtape (May 7, PS5/Xbox/Switch 2/PC), Onimusha Way of the Sword (2026, PC/Xbox/PS5), and others like Phantom Line, The Abased, and Where Winds Meet expansion using Unreal Engine 5 and RE Engine.

items.title: Nvidia CEO Claims Company Created Modern Video Game Industry
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang stated his company created the modern video game industry via GPUs and 3D graphics, amid criticism over AI upscaling like DLSS reducing optimization needs.

items.title: In-Game Advertising Market to Reach $12.5 Billion in 2026
items.summary: The in-game advertising market is projected to grow from $11.03 billion in 2025 to $12.5 billion in 2026 at a 13.3% CAGR, driven by mobile gaming and AI targeting.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
